# Rohit Gudi's Personal Website

This is my personal website built with Jekyll and hosted on GitHub Pages. The site features a clean, minimal design with Tailwind CSS for styling.

## Features

- Professional and minimal design
- Resume and professional information
- Link to external blog at [caretak3r.bearblog.dev](https://caretak3r.bearblog.dev/)
- GitHub projects showcase

## Technology

- Jekyll static site generator
- TailwindCSS
- GitHub Pages hosting

## Local Development

To run this site locally:

```bash
# Install dependencies
bundle install
yarn install

# Start the development server
bundle exec jekyll serve
